article.title: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K

headline: Celsius CEO Seeks Sentence Reversal Amid $4.2B Collapse

article.title: Ex-Celsius CEO files motion to vacate sentence after lawyers withdraw
article.summary: Former CEO Alex Mashinsky filed documents seeking to vacate his 12-year sentence, which included claims involving FTX and a “hostile takeover” by a former Celsius executive, who was sentenced to time served.

headline: Zambia 2053 Bonds Surge 10% on Buyback Tender

article.title: Zambia Bonds Jump After 2053 Debt Buyback Tender Starts
article.summary: Zambia started a cash tender offer to buy back its $1.36 billion bond due in 2053, becoming the latest African nation to repurchase outstanding debt as governments seek to reduce their servicing costs.

headline: AI Errors Soar 70% in Crypto Data Analysis

article.title: AI Models Can’t Agree on Basic Facts Most of the Time, Study Shows
article.summary: A new study gave five frontier AI models 1,000 real-world claims to fact-check. They disagreed on 67% of them.

article.summary: Texas is seeking a custodian to transition reserve assets from Blackrock's IBIT into direct bitcoin holdings.
